# Plyler's Tree Service

> Locally owned tree service based in Arkadelphia, Arkansas, serving Clark County
> and a 40-mile radius across southwest Arkansas since 2002. Owner-operated by
> Robbie Plyler. 5.0★ on Google (70+ reviews). Licensed and insured. Free estimates.
> 24/7 emergency storm response.

## Contact
- Phone: (870) 245-7944
- Email: info@plylerstreeservice.com
- Location: Arkadelphia, AR 71923 (Service Area Business)
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 7:00 AM–2:00 PM; 24/7 emergency
- Service area: Clark, Garland, Hot Spring, Pike & Montgomery counties

## Services
- [Tree Removal](https://www.plylerstreeservice.com/tree-removal): Safe sectional removal of hazardous, dead, and storm-damaged trees.
- [Tree Trimming & Pruning](https://www.plylerstreeservice.com/tree-trimming): Proper branch-collar cuts — no topping.
- [Stump Grinding](https://www.plylerstreeservice.com/stump-grinding): Stumps ground 6–8 inches below grade.
- [Emergency Storm Damage](https://www.plylerstreeservice.com/emergency-storm-damage): 24/7 storm response and cleanup.
